title: AutoZone Vendor Summit Recognizes Contributions of Top Suppliers
author: Globe Newswire
description: AutoZone recognized 18 of its top suppliers at its annual Vendor Summit, with Clarios being named the 2025 Vendor of the Year. Several other vendors were honored for their exceptional performance and commitment to customer satisfaction.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights AutoZone's recognition of its top suppliers, indicating the company's strong performance and commitment to customer satisfaction.
Reach was recognized with the AutoZone Extra Miler award, which honors vendors who go above and beyond in customer satisfaction.
Gates was recognized with the AutoZone WITTDTJR® award, which honors vendors who prioritize customers through product innovations and investments.

title: Acuity Brands (AYI) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Lag
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Acuity Brands (AYI) reports mixed third-quarter fiscal 2024 results, courtesy of solid ISG net sales and lower contributions from the ABL segment.

title: Built-to-Order & Land Buyout Strategies Aid KB Home (KBH)
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: KB Home (KBH) to benefit from favorable longer-term housing market conditions, including a shortage of new and resale homes, robust employment, wage growth and rising household formations.

title: AECOM (ACM) Secures Portage Bay Bridge Project Contract
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: AECOM (ACM) has been selected as the Lead Designer for the Washington State Department of Transportation's SR 520 Portage Bay Bridge and Roanoke Lid Project.

title: Gates (GTES) vs. Sterling (STRL): Which is a More Profitable Pick?
author: Ankita Gupta
description: Amid macroeconomic headwinds, the public sector is encouraging for the industry. Let's find out whether Gates (GTES) or Sterling (STRL) is a better Engineering - R and D Services stock.
